use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF MAJOR DEPRESSIVE DISORDER BY DOSING AT INTERVALS OF 24 HOURS

indications.text:
Aplenzin® (bupropion hydrobromide extended-release tablets) is indicated for the treatment of
major depressive disorder.
The efficacy of bupropion in the treatment of a major depressive episode was established in two
4-week controlled trials of inpatients and in one 6-week controlled trial of outpat...

1.1 Major Depressive Disorder
APLENZIN® (bupropion hydrobromide) extended-release tablets is indicated for the treatment of major depressive
disorder (MDD), as defined by the Diagnostic and Statistical Manual (DSM).
